mapper.select: select (select count(1) from edu_course where del_flag = '0') as courseCount, (select count(1) from edu_teacher_profile where del_flag = '0' and status = '0') as teacherCount, (select count(1) from edu_student_profile where del_flag = '0' and status = '0') as studentCount, (select count(1) from edu_course_enrollment where enroll_status in ('1', '3')) as enrollmentCount, (select count(1) from edu_assignment where publish_status = '1') as assignmentCount, (select count(1) from edu_assignment_submission where review_status = '1') as reviewedCount, ifnull((select round(sum(case when review_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) / count(1) * 100, 2) from edu_assignment_submission), 0) as reviewRate, ifnull((select round(avg(progress_percent), 2) from edu_course_enrollment where enroll_status in ('1', '3')), 0) as avgProgress

select c.course_id as courseId, c.course_name as courseName, t.term_name as termName, c.selected_count as selectedCount, ifnull(round(avg(e.progress_percent), 2), 0) as avgProgress, sum(case when e.enroll_status = '3' then 1 else 0 end) as finishedCount from edu_course c left join edu_term t on c.term_id = t.term_id left join edu_course_enrollment e on c.course_id = e.course_id and e.enroll_status in ('1', '3') where c.del_flag = '0' group by c.course_id, c.course_name, t.term_name, c.selected_count order by c.selected_count desc, avgProgress desc limit 8

select ct.teacher_user_id as teacherUserId, ifnull(u.nick_name, tp.teacher_name) as teacherName, count(distinct ct.course_id) as courseCount, count(distinct a.assignment_id) as assignmentCount, sum(case when a.publish_status = '1' then 1 else 0 end) as publishedAssignmentCount from edu_course_teacher ct left join sys_user u on ct.teacher_user_id = u.user_id left join edu_teacher_profile tp on ct.teacher_user_id = tp.user_id left join edu_assignment a on ct.course_id = a.course_id where ct.status = '0' group by ct.teacher_user_id, ifnull(u.nick_name, tp.teacher_name) order by courseCount desc, assignmentCount desc limit 8

select a.assignment_id as assignmentId, c.course_name as courseName, a.title as title, a.deadline_time as deadlineTime, sum(case when s.review_status = '0' then 1 else 0 end) as pendingReviewCount from edu_assignment a left join edu_course c on a.course_id = c.course_id left join edu_assignment_submission s on a.assignment_id = s.assignment_id and s.is_latest = '1' where a.publish_status = '1' group by a.assignment_id, c.course_name, a.title, a.deadline_time order by a.deadline_time asc limit 8
